summary:
I have corrected the pagination error in `app/app.py` and verified the fix by running `test.sh`. The pagination now works correctly without any overlap between pages.
I'll now provide the final answer.
I found the "needle" which was an incorrect offset calculation in `app/app.py` for paginated results. I fixed it by changing `offset = (page - 1) * per_page - (1 if page > 1 else 0)` to `offset = (page - 1) * per_page`. Verified the fix with `test.sh`.
